ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "number_of_books" INTEGER /* Number of books in the project */,
  "total_words" INTEGER /* Total number of words in the project */,
  "service_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the services provided */,
  "rate_per_word" REAL /* Rate per 100 words for book services */,
  "formatting_cost" REAL /* Additional cost for formatting, graphics, and book covers */,
  "audio_hours" REAL /* Total audio hours required for audiobooks */,
  "audio_cost_per_hour" REAL /* Cost per finished hour for audio mastering */,
  "total_audio_cost" REAL /* Total cost for audio services */,
  "sub_total" REAL /* Subtotal cost for the project */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms for the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of project (book or audiobook) */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author associated with the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the service */,
  "rate_per_word" REAL /* Rate per 100 words for book services */,
  "rate_per_hour" REAL /* Rate per finished hour for audio mastering */,
  "additional_cost" REAL /* Additional cost for services like formatting, graphics, and book covers */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (book or audio) */,
  "service_description_long" TEXT /* Long description of the service */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the service was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the service was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects_services" (
  "project_service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-service relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the service used in the project */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost for the service in the project */,
  "service_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the service */,
  "service_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the service */,
  "service_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the service */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_services_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_services_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the project sold */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale was made */,
  "sale_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the sale was made */,
  "sale_format" TEXT /* Format of the sale (book or audiobook) */,
  "royalty_rate" REAL /* Royalty rate for the sale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lead_magnets" (
  "lead_magnet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lead magnet */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the lead magnet */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the lead magnet */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the lead magnet */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the lead magnet */,
  "cost_per_item" REAL /* Cost per item of the lead magnet */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost for the lead magnet */,
  "lead_magnet_type" TEXT /* Type of lead magnet */,
  "lead_magnet_status" TEXT /* Status of the lead magnet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lead magnet was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lead magnet was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lead_magnet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lead_magnets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project or sale */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed (if applicable) */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale being accessed (if applicable) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project or sale was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "royalty_rate" REAL /* Royalty rate for the author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the author was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the author was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the platform */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the platform was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the platform was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "royalty_payments" (
  "royalty_payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each royalty payment */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author receiving the payment */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale associated with the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("royalty_payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_royalty_payments_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_royalty_payments_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)
